name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new kernel skill for this repository

labels: skill-request
assignees: ''
---

## Skill name

<!-- e.g. write-cuda-attention-kernel -->

## Category

<!-- Which directory should it live in? cuda, triton, patterns, quantization, portability, inference -->

## Scope

What specific task should this skill help an AI agent perform? Be concrete.

## Why existing skills do not cover this

List any existing skills that are related and explain why they are insufficient.

## Target audience

Who would use this skill? (e.g. CUDA kernel engineers, Triton inference deployers, quantization tooling authors)

## Technical complexity

What makes this skill non-trivial? What specific hardware constraints, algorithmic choices, or correctness pitfalls should it address?

## Additional context

Any relevant references, papers, or prior art.
